expectations.text: Provides a complete prometheus.yml with scrape_configs
expectations.evidence: A complete prometheus.yml with global and scrape_configs sections provided
Uses /metrics as metrics_path, not the correct /prometheus/metrics or the federate path

expectations.text: Mentions PROJECT_ID must be in the metrics path
expectations.evidence: No mention of PROJECT_ID in the metrics path; uses a generic /metrics endpoint at iam.api.nebius.cloud
Uses authorization.type: Bearer with credentials_file for bearer token auth
Sets scrape_interval: 60s (not 15s) in both global and job-level config
